name: Check Cashing Shop N Quick
description_short: Check Cashing Shop N Quick provides check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services at their Fresno, CA location with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Check Cashing Shop N Quick operates as a financial services provider specializing in check cashing and related transaction services. Based on available information, the company is located at 3564 E Belmont Ave in Fresno, California and serves the local community with traditional check cashing and money transfer solutions.

The company offers check cashing as its primary service, along with money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment options. These services are designed for consumers who need quick access to funds from checks or need to send money domestically or internationally. The business operates on an extended schedule to accommodate working customers.

Check Cashing Shop N Quick differentiates itself through convenient operating hours that extend until 7:30 PM on Fridays and 5:00 PM on Saturdays, providing accessibility beyond standard banking hours. The physical location in Fresno's East side offers local, in-person service for immediate transactions without requiring a bank account.

Like most check cashing establishments, the company charges fees for its services, which consumers should verify before use. The website provided contains limited details about specific fee structures, service terms, or company background. Consumers should contact the business directly at (559) 486-8245 to understand exact costs and any restrictions on check sizes or types accepted.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 7:00 PM-7:30 PM, accommodating working customers
Saturday operations until 5:00 PM for weekend access
Multiple financial services in one location (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment)
Local in-person service requiring no bank account
Same-location service enabling immediate fund access
Serves underbanked populations in East Fresno area
Direct phone line (559) 486-8245 for customer inquiries
cons: Check cashing fees not disclosed on available website — consumers must call for pricing
Limited information about check amount limits, hold periods, or restrictions
No online or mobile service options mentioned — in-person only
Closed Sundays and limited Sunday hours (11 AM-2 PM) if reopened
No details provided about wire transfer fees or money order costs
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without checking accounts
Workers needing immediate access to paycheck funds outside banking hours
Individuals sending domestic or international wire transfers
Customers in East Fresno needing convenient, walk-in financial services
diagnosis: Check Cashing Shop N Quick is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Fresno area who need immediate access to funds outside traditional banking hours. The primary caveat is that specific fee structures and service limits are not disclosed online, requiring direct contact with the business before use.
services: Local check cashing without account requirements
